For Professionals 
Clinical Overview 
Learn about clinical signs of polio disease, transmission, diagnosis, and case definition. 
Vaccine Recommendations 
Find routine recommendations, accelerated schedules, other considerations for polio vaccine. 
Investigating a Suspected Case of Polio 
Learn about what to do if you suspect your patient may have polio. 
Lab Testing 
Learn about laboratory testing and diagnostic methods for poliovirus. 
Health Departments: Reporting Cases 
Learn how to report suspected poliovirus and the rules for reporting. 
Polio 
Polio was once one of the most feared diseases in the United States. Thanks to the polio vaccine, wild poliovirus has been eliminated in this country.
